security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.scryfall.com https://cards.scryfall.io https://api.pokemontcg.io; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first TCG scanner and collection manager.
bundle.longDescription: Binderbase scans your Magic: The Gathering and Pokemon TCG cards, tracks your collection in a local SQLite database, and looks up prices from public data sources. No cloud account required.
